ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monthly_weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data entry */,
  "precip_min" REAL /* Minimum precipitation recorded for the month (in inches) */,
  "precip_max" REAL /* Maximum precipitation recorded for the month (in inches) */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the month (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the month (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "avg_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation for the month (in inches) */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the month (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the data entry */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_stations table */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., City or Region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state the location belongs to */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  "sensors" TEXT /* Sensors used by the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., excessive rain, extreme temperature) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES monthly_weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., governmental agency) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, ground sensor) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES monthly_weather_data ("data_id")
)
